transcript.text:
[For Dokdo Day]
[Our special guest] [84 prawn mukbang with Kian 84]
[But before that!]
[Let's go to Dokdo]
[Dokdo from Ulleungdo]
[You can see it on a clear day]
[Let's start!]
[Dokdo is South Korea's Land!]
[This island can be visited only when the weather permits]
So this is Dokdo!
[Clear Dokdo waters]
[The whole island is a nature reserve!]
Dokdo is our land!
I prepared some Dokdo prawns for today's Dokdo episode
I won't be eating alone today I invited a guest that I really like
Kian84~!

Hello
[Cartoonist/celebrity]
[And a YouTuber!]
I was surprised when you invited me
I thought there were a lot of special guests already
-But I'm the first, right? -Yes you are
Very cool
If you look over there
You can still see it
Yes, that's Dokdo
I prepared Dokdo prawns for Dokdo day
84 of them just for you, Kian84
84...
What if I was Kian840? Then 840 prawns?
That still sounds possible
There are a variety of different kinds, but the smallest one is the flower prawn

The ones with horns are the spiny lobster prawns
The biggest one is the Coonstripe Shrimp
I heard earlier that this is the famous Shrimp Cracker's logo
Right, they look the same!
It looks more appetizing now
Thank you for having me I get to eat something like this thanks to you
Well.. I..
Thank you!
Are we eating it like this?!
Just take it out and eat?
This is freshwater, so they will all die soon
That's terrifying
The prawns are trembling in fear
[Should we dig in?]
Try the Coonstripe Shrimp first!
It has roes Do I eat that too?

Yes you can
Peel the head, right?
Yes, I'll give you scissors
[Decapitated]
Wait a sec,
How do you eat the roe?
It's edible, but you don't have to eat it
I feel bad, so I'll eat it
This peels easily
[Does it...?]
Do you have tips on how to peel it?
Well, for these... Are you having trouble? Do you want me to peel them for you?
No, I'll do it for you
That looks tasty
This is the Coonstripe Shrimp It's big, right?
Here, have a plate

Have a plate? haha
Cheers
Bon appetit
Delicious
Right? Yes
Accomplished
I've seen this before
This is the spiny lobster prawn
-Shrimp crackers? -Yes
I'll try that too
Thankfully they're dead
Let me teach you how to peel it
Grab the side like this
And peel
Grab the 4th joint
Pull it just like this

Wow, you're good at this
I do mukbang
I feel bad because they all have roes
Eat the ones without roe
I should peel them for you
Tasty?
Is it different?
It's very similar to the Coonstripe Shrimp
The spiny lobster prawn is a little sweeter
Does it taste like fried chicken?
[Ignores] Wow, this tastes so good
The shell on this one is strong
I like the spiny lobster prawn more
Good, right? Yes
-It's difficult, right? -It's okay. I'm having fun
It's not easy

Here you go
Thank you
The head is not bad either
It's good if you dip it in the sesame oil
How did this become the logo for the snack?
Because they're pretty The colors are beautiful
Regular shrimps are gray
You're right!
They turn red when they get cooked!
Here, try this
With salt!
It's so good
Good, right?
Don't worry about me You should just eat
Seems like you aren't eating much because you're taking care of me
[Well then, let's eat]

So good
Beautiful view, right?
Amazing?
It feels different eating here
Feels special
Looking at Dokdo
Let's not get sad now
These guys that were swimming over there not too long ago
Sorry to have met you this way
You'll peel them for us? Really?
Thank you
Wow, look at all that meat
[You're scaring me]
There's not too much to say on Mukbang
Yes, you just end up eating mindlessly
Just eat!

Brilliance
The stripes
I had a lot of prawns at Chebu-do
Chebu island
That's really good
One of these can go up to 10,000 Won each (~$8.55 USD)
So this is roughly 800,000 Won...?
Really?
I'll have to eat the shell too then
-I didn't think I could eat a lot, but it's so good -It's good, right?
I'm not a big eater
Hey Kian84,
I had so many questions, but I forgot
Do you remember going to Dokdo?
That, I remember
Why're you forgetting stuff already? You're still young

-Do I need to study more? -That's not the problem!
Grab 3 of them like this
So big
She's different for sure
[Me too]
You're a good eater too
-You're eating the head too?! -Yes
Is the head edible as raw?
Well if the body is okay,
-Is it good? -The body is good
The head is just all shell
Have you've been eating the whole thing as a whole?
Well, it's just head
[You have something here]
Why am I so clumsy
Gom-soon!

Cute!
Do you want shrimp?
Do you eat this?
No, just eat dog food This is too expensive
[Then why'd you ask?]
You're eating non-stop
You ate a lot I think more than me
[You can eat fast if you just eat the whole thing]
Wait a minute!
I need to learn mukbang from you
Let's try it
It saved you from all the trouble
I can't eat this as a whole though
-Yeah, not that one -My teeth will shatter
What's going on?
I want some soju

Do you want some rowan drink?
Made alcohol from rowan fruit
This is it right here
[Thank you!]
-Rowan is a fruit? -Yes
Thank you sir
How much do you want?
That's good
[He's very happy now]
That's incredible
[Need some food to go with it]
Don't eat the head
Let's butter-grill it later
Oh wow really? Thank you!
I like eating it straight from the tank
What if we ask him to put the shell back on

Cheers
You love drinking
That's amazing
I'm full now
Really?
Aren't you full yet?
Not at all
So good at eating
Let's get 4 at the same time
I can't eat anymore
But you ate pretty quickly More than me
This is all
But you ate their heads
Let's see yours
This is horrifying
Spiny lobster prawn 4 of them

That's so good Very sweet
I love it
I'm happy
Very happy
Really?
That's good
As you grow older, the euphoria from eating food gets greater
I'm so full
-You can stop eating -Last 2 for me
This isn't enough for me
Are you not getting full?
I wouldn't be doing mukbang if I get full from this
There are a lot of people that can eat a lot
No Not really
I've seen lots of big eaters
But you eat a lot And don't gain weight

[Just act natural]
This is really strong
I'll be the dad
You can be the daughter
What if my daughter ends up eating as much as you?
I can't stop her from doing so
I'm finished
[Finished the alcohol] -You're not drunk, right? -No, I'm fine
Then I'll give you just a little bit more
What if you ruin this video by getting drunk?
That won't happen
Everything can be used for the video
[Butter-grilled Prawn Heads]
Thank you~
Prawn head grill!
Don't eat this part

Peel it like this
Take that out
[And eat]
Eat slowly
I'll just be the drunk uncle on the side
You can be the nephew that just eats
[As a whole again]
So good
You should take the shell out
I have to go on a diet
-It's ruined -Start the diet in your next life
No way
Do you want to rest?
I, the uncle, have some stuff to take care of
You can take the alcohol too
[Say less]

Do you want something to munch on too?
Don't eat too much!
Don't overdo it!
[2nd round begins]
Oh no!
I won't let a single one slide
[I'm bloated]
Let's peel
I'm not getting sick of it
[This is taking all day]
Last one!
How was your meal?
The food is filled up to here
Prawn doesn't fill you up though
Stop eating
All the Dokdo prawns are trembling

It was very interesting
to see someone eat so much and not gain weight
It's everyone's dream
You're really blessed
Really blessed to have the gift
I'll be rooting for you
Thank you I'll be rooting for you as well
It's not complete yet, but
[A portrait of Tzuyang]
You said your birthday is on April
So I put forsythia
Bloom like the spring flowers
Your smile is a very innocent smile just like a school student's
Thank you
I will draw you next time
I'd love that

I'd be honored
To be receiving a drawing from Tzuyang It's very limited
Thank you very much
I'll cherish it
Thank you for today
Say the closing statement with me
Thanks everyone together
-Thanks everyone! -Together!
Oh, not "together"?
Together "together"?
Oh together
Thanks everyone~
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
